nldPatternAnalysis.title: SSE Status Synchronization Failure Pattern Analysis
nldPatternAnalysis.description: Comprehensive pattern detection for SSE connection failures where frontend shows 'starting' but backend shows 'running'

NLD-SSE-001.name: SSE Connection Establishment Failure
NLD-SSE-001.description: EventSource fails to establish initial connection despite successful HTTP response
symptoms: Frontend shows 'starting' status indefinitely
EventSource readyState remains at CONNECTING (0)
SSE /stream endpoint returns 200 but no messages received
No 'onopen' event fired on EventSource
Backend logs show successful stream creation but no active connections
rootCauses: CORS headers misconfigured for SSE streams
Nginx buffering enabled blocking SSE flow

frontend.missingOpenEvent: onopen handler never called within connection timeout

preventionStrategies: Add comprehensive SSE header validation middleware
Implement connection establishment timeout with explicit error handling
Add EventSource state monitoring with automatic fallback to polling
Include SSE-specific CORS configuration validation
Add nginx configuration validation for SSE endpoints
tddStrategies: Test EventSource connection establishment with timeout validation
Mock network conditions that prevent SSE establishment
Validate SSE headers in integration tests
Test fallback mechanisms when SSE fails to establish
Create regression tests for CORS SSE configuration

NLD-SSE-002.name: Status Event Listener Registration Failure
NLD-SSE-002.description: Frontend SSE connection established but status update handlers not properly registered
symptoms: SSE connection shows as active in backend logs
Backend broadcasts status messages successfully
Frontend EventSource receives messages but status not updated
Console shows message parsing but no status change
UI components show stale status despite active SSE
rootCauses: Status message type mismatch between frontend and backend
Component state update blocked by React strict mode
Event handler overwritten by multiple registrations

frontend.messageReceived: onmessage event fired with status data
frontend.stateNotUpdated: Component status state unchanged after message
frontend.consoleMessages: SSE message logged but no status update logged

backend.activeConnections: Connections exist for instance in ConnectionManager
backend.messageSentSuccess: sendMessage returns true for status messages

preventionStrategies: Implement idempotent event handler registration
Add status message schema validation
Create status update propagation chain monitoring
Add React state update validation for SSE messages
Implement handler registration verification system
tddStrategies: Test event handler registration order and persistence
Mock SSE messages with invalid status schemas
Test React component status updates with SSE integration
Validate handler deduplication mechanisms
Create integration tests for status propagation chain

NLD-SSE-003.name: Status Broadcast Without Receivers
NLD-SSE-003.description: Backend successfully broadcasts status but no active SSE connections receive the message
symptoms: Backend logs show broadcastInstanceStatus called
ConnectionManager.getConnectionsForInstance returns empty array
SSE connections count shows 0 despite frontend showing connected
Status messages sent to void with no error indication
Frontend status remains stale despite backend status changes
rootCauses: Instance ID mismatch between frontend and backend
SSE connection dropped but not detected

connectionTracking.staleConnections: Connections marked as alive but socket closed
connectionTracking.cleanupFailure: Dead connections not removed from tracking

preventionStrategies: Implement connection heartbeat validation system
Add instance ID consistency validation
Create connection state synchronization verification
Add automatic connection cleanup with verification
Implement connection tracking audit system
tddStrategies: Test connection tracking under various failure scenarios
Mock connection drops and verify cleanup
Test instance ID propagation consistency
Validate connection state after network interruptions
Create stress tests for connection tracking accuracy

NLD-SSE-004.name: Status State Transition Blocking
NLD-SSE-004.description: Status messages received but UI state transitions prevented by validation or race conditions
symptoms: Frontend receives status messages successfully
Event handlers triggered with correct data
Component state validation prevents status update
UI shows previous status despite new messages
State transition validation errors in console
rootCauses: Race condition between multiple status updates
React state batching preventing immediate updates

frontend.stateUpdateBlocked: setState called but component state unchanged

preventionStrategies: Implement status transition queue with validation
Add component lifecycle validation for status updates
Create status update deduplication system
Add status transition rule validation
Implement graceful status rollback mechanisms
tddStrategies: Test status transitions under rapid update scenarios
Mock component lifecycle events during status updates
Test status validation with edge case values
Validate status update queuing and ordering
Create integration tests for status transition rules

NLD-SSE-005.name: SSE Event Stream Silent Disconnection
NLD-SSE-005.description: SSE connection silently drops without triggering error handlers or reconnection
symptoms: Frontend shows connected status but receives no messages
Backend continues sending messages to closed connection
No onerror or onclose events fired on frontend
Connection appears active in backend metrics
Status updates stop flowing without user notification
rootCauses: Network proxy silently dropping long-lived connections
Server-side connection timeout not properly handled
Silent network failures without proper detection

frontend.heartbeatMissed: No heartbeat messages received for > 60 seconds
frontend.messageGap: Time since last message > expected threshold
frontend.connectionStateStale: EventSource.readyState shows OPEN but no activity

backend.connectionAlive: Connection marked alive but actual socket closed

preventionStrategies: Implement bidirectional heartbeat system with acknowledgment
Add connection activity monitoring with automatic detection
Create connection health validation with periodic verification
Add automatic reconnection on silent disconnection detection
Implement connection state validation system
tddStrategies: Simulate silent network disconnections
Test heartbeat failure detection and recovery
Mock browser tab suspension scenarios
Test connection health monitoring accuracy
Validate reconnection logic for silent failures

connectionMonitoring.bidirectionalHeartbeat: Implement ping-pong system between frontend and backend
connectionMonitoring.connectionHealthCheck: Regular validation of connection state accuracy
connectionMonitoring.automaticFallback: Seamless fallback to HTTP polling when SSE fails
connectionMonitoring.reconnectionStrategy: Exponential backoff with intelligent retry logic

stateValidation.instanceIdConsistency: Continuous validation of instance ID propagation
stateValidation.messageSchemaValidation: Strict validation of SSE message formats
stateValidation.componentStateSync: Ensure UI state matches actual connection state

errorHandling.userNotification: Clear communication of connection state to users

tests: Validate SSE headers in all environments
Test CORS configuration for SSE endpoints
Test fallback to polling when SSE fails
Test React component status update integration
Test connection tracking accuracy under failures
Validate instance ID consistency across layers

neuralPatternExport.predictionModel: Failure probability based on connection patterns
neuralPatternExport.adaptiveLearning: Continuous improvement from real failure data

memoryIntegration.persistentStorage: Long-term pattern storage in claude-flow memory
